title: NZ Government Web Standards (WCAG 2.2 aligned)
description: Mandatory web accessibility and usability standards for NZ Government agencies, effective March 2025. Comprises two standards: Web Accessibility Standard 1.2 (aligned with WCAG 2.2) and Web Usability Standard 1.4. Requires self-assessment, risk reporting, and conformance monitoring.

source.page_title: NZ Government Web Standards | NZ Digital government

change_log.author: auto-generated
change_log.summary: New guardrail created from NZ Government Web Standards (WCAG 2.2 aligned). Establishes mandatory web accessibility and usability requirements for NZ government agencies effective March 2025.
